chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2275 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.9639/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection (s) 3. For order on M.A No.9640/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 13.01.2026 Mr.Rafique Ahmed Laghari, Advocate for the petitioners ******* 1. Granted. 2to4. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that the petitioners are differently‐abled persons and that Disability Certificates have been annexed with the petition (available at pages 15–19). Upon perusal of the said certificates, it appears that they do not conform to the requirements prescribed under the applicable law. When confronted with this position, learned counsel submits that the petitioners have already applied for the requisite certificates in accordance with the provisions of the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, before the competent Board/Committee constituted in 2019 under the said Act. He, therefore, seeks disposal of the instant petition at this stage, with permission to file a fresh petition upon receipt of valid Disability Certificates from the competent authority. Accordingly, the instant petition stands disposed of. The petitioners, however, shall be at liberty to file a fresh petition after obtaining the requisite certificates, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
